_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: According to this mathematical model, the NF1 gene only had to take 'one step' (one interaction) to reach the phenotype OMIM 162200. The genes SDC2 and VCP had to take only two steps (two interactions)
details: Mathematical model showed NF1 gene required only one step to reach phenotype OMIM 162200, while SDC2 and VCP required only two steps
